name: pulse
description: Project management and progress tracking platform

scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate && cd client && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd server && npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss
scripts.prisma:seed: cd server && npx prisma db seed
scripts.postinstall: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
